series_metadata.series_title: Disabled Workers Relief Fund (DWRF) Semi-Annual Billings
series_metadata.series_description: The Disabled Workers Relief Fund (DWRF) Semi-Annual Billings contain payments made and charged to all Self-Insured Employers. The reports contain employer information on bankruptcy, cancellations, individual warrant deletions, past court cases, etc.
